CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE:

Robert B. Kaplan, Esq., for Wells Fargo Bank, Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling Adopted with modification: Application for Writ of Possession granted as to defendants VPL, Inc., LPC Packaging; and P & D Loduca LLC. Plaintiff shall file an undertaking in the sum of $10,000.00 prior to issuance of writ of possession is Granted.

Modification: Undertaking on Writ of Possession shall be $750,000. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT.

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jul-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:



APPEARANCE:

Robert B. Kaplan, Esq., for Wells Fargo Bank, Plaintiff/Moving Party

Tentative ruling adopted with modification: Application For Issuance of Right to Attach Order and Writ of Attachment granted as to Vincent P. Loduca, Jr.; aka Vincent Loduca, Jr.; aka V. P. Loduca, Jr.; aka Vincent Loduca; aka V. P. Loduca; aka Phil Loduca; Plaintiff shall file an undertaking in the sum of $10,000.00 prior to issuance of writ of attachment is granted.

Modification: Undertaking on Writ of Possession shall be $750.000. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT.
